title: erigeron notobellidiastrum
intro: Erigeron notobellidiastrum, also known as the Notobellidiastrum fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antihistamine effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Erigeron notobellidiastrum can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal infusions, teas, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
